summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end frontend verification of bug fixes (Iteration 43). All reported issues have been verified as FIXED: 1) Login works correctly and redirects to /feed with 'Welcome back!' message, 2) Seller Dashboard loads without 'Failed to load dashboard data' error, 3) Photo Editor modal opens correctly with 'Select Photos' button working, 4) Auto-Enhance and Remove Background buttons work without 'Failed to Fetch' errors, 5) Batch 'Remove All Backgrounds' processes successfully. All 13 backend pytest tests pass.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login with test@example.com/Test123! works and redirects to /feed
Frontend: 'Welcome back!' toast message displayed after login
Frontend: Seller Dashboard (/seller-dashboard) loads without 'Failed to load' error
Frontend: Seller Dashboard shows stats (Active Listings, Total Sales, Total Views, BL Coins)
Frontend: Photo Editor tab accessible from Seller Dashboard
Frontend: Photo Editor modal opens via 'Open Photo Editor' button
Frontend: Photo Editor shows existing photos (10 photos loaded)
Frontend: 'Select Photos' button visible in Photo Editor modal
Frontend: File input elements properly associated with labels
Frontend: 'Remove Background' button works (shows 'Background Removed' for processed photos)
Frontend: 'Auto-Enhance' button works (shows 'Already Enhanced' for processed photos)
Frontend: Batch 'Remove All Backgrounds' button processes remaining photos successfully
Frontend: No 'Failed to Fetch' errors on any Photo Editor action
Frontend: AI Listing Creator page (/ai-listing-creator) loads correctly
Frontend: AI Listing Creator shows step indicator (Photos → Details → Price → Shipping → Publish)
Backend: All 13 pytest tests pass (login, seller stats, seller performance, photo editor APIs)
critical_code_review_comments: All bug fixes verified working: seller_dashboard.py datetime handling, PhotoEditorModal.jsx file input ref, AIListingCreator.jsx userLocation?.zip
Photo Editor modal correctly defaults to 'edit' tab with useState('edit')
Batch processing for background removal and auto-enhance working correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data (10 photos in Photo Editor)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All bug fixes from iteration 42 verified working in end-to-end frontend tests. Login flow works, Seller Dashboard loads correctly, Photo Editor modal opens and all AI features (Remove Background, Auto-Enhance) work without 'Failed to Fetch' errors. AI Listing Creator page accessible. Note: Seller Dashboard route is /seller-dashboard (not /seller/dashboard).
